title: Malare
lyrics:
Malare ninne kaanathirunnal
Mizhivekiya niramellam maayunna pole
Alivoden arikathinnanayathirunnal
Azhakekiya kanavellam akalunna pole

Njanente aathmavin aazhathinullil
Athilolamarorumariyaathe sookshicha
Thaalangal raagangal eenangalaai
Oro oro varnangalai
Idarunna ennte idanenjinullil
Pranayathin mazhayayi nee pozhiyunnee naalil

Thalarunnorente thanuthorum ninte
Alathallum pranayathalunarum
Malare..azhake..

Kulirekum kanavil nee kathiradiya kaalam
Manathaaril madhumaasam thaliraadiya neram

Akamurukum mayilinakal thuyilunarum kaalam
En akathaaril anuraagam pakarunna yaamam

Azhake… Azhakil theerthoru shilayazhake
Malare.. Ennuyaril vidarum panimalare

title: Appangal Embadum
lyrics:
Appangal embadum
Ottaykku chuttammayi
Ammayi chuttathu.. marumonukillayi

Kiliye.. kiliye..
Manathu parakkum kiliye
Chollu.. kiliye..
Enthe.. kiliye..
Kinnara kombil irunnu kinungum
Enthonnu chollu kiliye..

title: Jivvamshamayi
lyrics:
Jeevamshamayi.. thane nee ennil
Kaalangalayi.. kootintee koottil
Ninnu poy.. ninnu poy
En karalil.. pathiye pathiye nee

Nilaavin.. thumbile nira thiri
Kinaavin.. chembil udaya thiri
Iniyum.. iniyum.. namukkennu
Ee swapnam.. thira poya thira poya..

title: Jimikki Kammal
lyrics:
Entammede jimikki kammal
Entappan kondu poy
Entappande lunkie
Entamma chuttu poy

Lal lal la.. lal lal la..
Lal lal la.. lal lal la..

Nalla nalla jimikki kammal
Nalla nalla jimikki kammal
Maane maane.. ninnodu mindaan
Enthonnum illallo..

title: Thiruvaavaniraavun
lyrics:
Thiruvaavaniraavu.. manasinnu niraye
Ponnoonjalaaduvan.. nammude veedinte
Muttam thorum.. poovili thirayil
Muttathe mangalam.. pon pooviliyum..

Thiruvaavaniraavu.. manasinnu niraye
Ponnoonjalaaduvan.. nammude veedinte

title: Poomuthole
lyrics:
Poomuthole.. nee enna vazhiyil
Kanneerum.. nanavum kaanalay
Nee poy.. nee poy..
Ennu nammal.. thammil kaanum
Iniyum.. iniyum..
Pranayame.. iniyum kaanaam nammal..

Poomuthole.. nee enna vazhiyil
Kanneerum.. nanavum kaanalay
